title: esula retusa
intro: Esula retusa, also known as the prickly ash, is a deciduous shrub native to North America, characterized by its compound leaves and small white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Esula retusa include relief from digestive issues, pain management, and immune system support. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
